user_quotes: On the listing day, the stock was not visible on the Groww app for around 10 minutes after it went live on the exchange.

I request everyone to use a different app.. because this apps customer support is completely unusable.. they don't receive call and if they receive by any chance they just cut the call after listening your problem
The app is constantly lagging and freezing. Moreover, my data keeps disappearing or getting hidden automatically.
action_ideas: Optimize app performance to prevent delays in trading, especially during critical market events
Hire more customer support staff and improve response times to resolve issues promptly
Conduct thorough testing to identify and fix bugs, ensuring a seamless user experience
weekly_note.summary: Users are experiencing significant frustration due to trading experience issues, poor customer support, and app performance problems. Resolving these pain points is crucial to improve user satisfaction and retention.
